# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cloud iam misconfiguration.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: >
  Cross-account IAM role for CI/CD system with secure trust policy.
  Uses explicit account allowlist and condition keys instead of wildcards
  to prevent overly permissive trust policies.

Parameters:
  OrganizationId:
    Type: String
    Description: AWS Organization ID (e.g., o-xxxxxxxxxx) to restrict trust to accounts within the org
    AllowedPattern: '^o-[a-z0-9]{10,32}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid AWS Organization ID starting with 'o-'

  TrustedAccountIds:
    Type: CommaDelimitedList
    Description: >
      Explicit list of trusted AWS account IDs that can assume this role.
      Do NOT use wildcards - enumerate each account for auditability.
    AllowedPattern: '^\d{12}$'
    ConstraintDescription: Each account ID must be exactly 12 digits

  ExternalId:
    Type: String
    Description: External ID for confused deputy protection
    MinLength: 16
    MaxLength: 128
    NoEcho: true

  RequireMFA:
    Type: String
    Default: 'true'
    AllowedValues:
      - 'true'
      - 'false'
    Description: Whether to require MFA for role assumption

  MaxSessionDurationSeconds:
    Type: Number
    Default: 3600
    MinValue: 900
    MaxValue: 7200
    Description: Maximum session duration in seconds (15 min to 2 hours for CI/CD)

  CICDRoleExternalName:
    Type: String
    Default: 'cicd-cross-account-role'
    AllowedPattern: '^[a-zA-Z0-9\-]+$'
    MaxLength: 64

Conditions:
  IsMFARequired: !Equals [!Ref RequireMFA, 'true']

Resources:
  CICDCrossAccountRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Ref CICDRoleExternalName
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDurationSeconds
      # Secure trust policy: explicit account list + org condition + external ID
      # NEVER use Principal: "*" or account wildcards in trust policies
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCrossAccountAssumptionFromExplicitAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ','
                - !Sub
                  - '${Accounts}'
                  - Accounts: !Join
                      - ','
                      - !Split
                          - ','
                          - !Sub
                            - ${Items}
                            - Items: !Join
                                - ','
                                - !Ref TrustedAccountIds
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              # Restrict to accounts within our AWS Organization only
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
              # External ID prevents confused deputy attacks
              StringEquals:
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref ExternalId
          - !If
            - IsMFARequired
            # Deny assumption without MFA when MFA is required
            - Sid: DenyAssumptionWithoutMFA
              Effect: Deny
              Principal:
                AWS: '*'
              Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
              Condition:
                BoolIfExists:
                  'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'false'
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'

      # Apply least-privilege permissions for CI/CD operations
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: CICDScopedPermissions
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: '2012-10-17'
            Statement:
              - Sid: AllowCodeDeployActions
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'codedeploy:GetDeployment'
                  - 'codedeploy:GetDeploymentGroup'
                  - 'codedeploy:CreateDeployment'
                  - 'codedeploy:ListDeployments'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:codedeploy:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:application:*'
                  - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:codedeploy:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:deploymentgroup:*/*'
              - Sid: AllowECRPullPush
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer'
                  - 'ecr:BatchGetImage'
                  - 'ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability'
                  - 'ecr:PutImage'
                  - 'ecr:InitiateLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:UploadLayerPart'
                  - 'ecr:CompleteLayerUpload'
                  - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:ecr:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:repository/cicd-*'
              - Sid: AllowECRAuth
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'ecr:GetAuthorizationToken'
                Resource: '*'
              - Sid: AllowS3ArtifactAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 's3:GetObject'
                  - 's3:PutObject'
                  - 's3:ListBucket'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-cicd-artifacts'
                  - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:s3:::${AWS::AccountId}-cicd-artifacts/*'
              - Sid: AllowCloudFormationDeploy
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
                  - 'cloudformation:DescribeChangeSet'
                  - 'cloudformation:CreateChangeSet'
                  - 'cloudformation:ExecuteChangeSet'
                  - 'cloudformation:DeleteChangeSet'
                Resource:
                  - !Sub 'arn:${AWS::Partition}:cloudformation:${AWS::Region}:${AWS::AccountId}:stack/cicd-*/*'
              # Explicit deny on sensitive actions to create a permissions boundary effect
              - Sid: DenySensitiveActions
                Effect: Deny
                Action:
                  - 'iam:CreateUser'
                  - 'iam:DeleteUser'
                  - 'iam:CreateRole'
                  - 'iam:DeleteRole'
                  - 'iam:AttachRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:PutRolePolicy'
                  - 'iam:CreatePolicy'
                  - 'iam:DeletePolicy'
                  - 'organizations:*'
                  - 'account:*'
                  - 'sts:AssumeRole'
                Resource: '*'

      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICDCrossAccountAccess
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation
        - Key: SecurityReview
          Value: Required

  # Permissions boundary to enforce guardrails even if inline policy is modified
  CICDPermissionsBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::ManagedPolicy
    Properties:
      ManagedPolicyName: !Sub '${CICDRoleExternalName}-permissions-boundary'
      Description: Permissions boundary for CI/CD cross-account role - prevents privilege escalation
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCICDServices
            Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - 'codedeploy:*'
              - 'ecr:*'
              - 's3:GetObject'
              - 's3:PutObject'
              - 's3:ListBucket'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeStacks'
              - 'cloudformation:CreateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:UpdateStack'
              - 'cloudformation:DescribeChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:CreateChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:ExecuteChangeSet'
              - 'cloudformation:DeleteChangeSet'
              - 'logs:CreateLogGroup'
              - 'logs:CreateLogStream'
              - 'logs:PutLogEvents'
            Resource: '*'
          - Sid: DenyIAMEscalation
            Effect: Deny
            Action:
              - 'iam:*'
              - 'organizations:*'
              - 'account:*'
              - 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Resource: '*'

  # Apply the permissions boundary to the role
  CICDCrossAccountRoleWithBoundary:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    DependsOn: CICDPermissionsBoundary
    DeletionPolicy: Retain
    UpdateReplacePolicy: Retain
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub '${CICDRoleExternalName}-bounded'
      MaxSessionDuration: !Ref MaxSessionDurationSeconds
      PermissionsBoundary: !Ref CICDPermissionsBoundary
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowCrossAccountFromOrgAccounts
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              AWS: !Split
                - ','
                - !Sub
                  - '${Accounts}'
                  - Accounts: !Join
                      - ','
                      - !Split
                          - ','
                          - !Sub
                            - ${Items}
                            - Items: !Join
                                - ','
                                - !Ref TrustedAccountIds
            Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
            Condition:
              StringEquals:
                'aws:PrincipalOrgID': !Ref OrganizationId
                'sts:ExternalId': !Ref ExternalId
              # Require secure transport
              Bool:
                'aws:SecureTransport': 'true'
          - !If
            - IsMFARequired
            - Sid: DenyWithoutMFA
              Effect: Deny
              Principal:
                AWS: '*'
              Action: 'sts:AssumeRole'
              Condition:
                BoolIfExists:
                  'aws:MultiFactorAuthPresent': 'false'
            - !Ref 'AWS::NoValue'
      Tags:
        - Key: Purpose
          Value: CICDCrossAccountAccess
        - Key: PermissionsBoundary
          Value: Applied
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

Outputs:
  RoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the CI/CD cross-account role (with permissions boundary)
    Value: !GetAtt CICDCrossAccountRoleWithBoundary.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-CICDRoleArn'

  RoleName:
    Description: Name of the CI/CD cross-account role
    Value: !Ref CICDCrossAccountRoleWithBoundary

  PermissionsBoundaryArn:
    Description: ARN of the permissions boundary policy
    Value: !Ref CICDPermissionsBoundary

  SecurityNotes:
    Description: Security configuration summary
    Value: !Sub >
      Trust policy restricted to Organization ${OrganizationId} with explicit account allowlist.
      External ID required. MFA required: ${RequireMFA}.
      Max session: ${MaxSessionDurationSeconds}s. Permissions boundary applied.
      No wildcards used in Principal - accounts are explicitly enumerated.
